LanguageData.ELIFV-22Transport.label: V-22 Osprey (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFV-22Transport.description: DESCRIPTION: The V-22 is a helicopter designed for medium to long range quick deploy huge capacity transport of goods and personnel, sacrificing a bit of range and uses large amounts of fuel. BASIC STATS: Health: 2000 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 2300kg Speed: 8 Passenger Capacity: 1-18 Fuel Per Tile: 25 Fuel Capacity: 2250 Round Trip Range: 45 Full Range: 90 Internal Power: 2500w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
